title: Legend of Zelda Music
description: Adds the Zelda-inspired music to the game.
body: This pack adds copyright free versions of the legend of zelda music and may not sound 100% the same. This pack keeps some minecraft music but changes 26 to zelda themed music. I got the music [here.](https://pixabay.com/music/search/zelda/) I hope you enjoy the new music rocking your world.
